{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Black Flame
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Path of Black Flame Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path]] of Black Flame, also known as the [[Blackflame]] [[Path]], is a specialized discipline centered on pure destruction. Originally stolen from ancient black [[dragons]], the art allows practitioners to imitate draconic power through various techniques. Historically, the [[Blackflame family]] utilized this [[Path]] to maintain a massive empire for over five hundred years through overwhelming force. While the empire has since declined, the [[Path]] remains a significant and recognizable power. The discipline is characterized by its volatile and destructive nature, capable of disintegrating physical matter into dust rather than melting it. It is often used in combat through techniques such as the [[Fierce Fire Robe]], which serves as an enforcer method, or the [[Burning Cloak]], which provides explosive movement. However, utilizing [[Blackflame madra]] carries severe risks; it is a corruptive force that can erode a practitioner's body, mind, soul, and lifespan. It also tends to induce aggression and a desire for dominance in those who cycle it. While the [[Path]] is not illegal to practice, its use can be difficult to conceal due to its distinct appearance. Practitioners often exhibit physical changes, such as eyes turning black with red irises. The [[Path]] is highly compatible with other destructive elements and can be integrated into various combat styles, though it is generally considered ill-suited for tasks requiring the taking of prisoners.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path]] of Black Flame, also known as the [[Blackflame]] [[Path]], is an art of pure and ruthless destruction that was originally stolen from ancient [[dragons]]. Although people seek to revive this path, it remains a discipline that [[Eithan]] is capable of teaching [[Lindon]]. During the [[Enforcer Trial]], which was specifically designed to test a single disciple on this path, [[Lindon]] had not yet learned any [[Striker techniques]] associated with it.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] was stolen from ancient [[dragons]] and is the art of pure destruction.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is also commonly called the [[Blackflame]] [[Path]] or the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame]] [[Path]] is a path [[Eithan]] can teach [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has not learned any [[Striker techniques]] on the [[Path of Black Flame]] yet.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Enforcer Trial]] was designed to test a single disciple on the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is associated with ruthless destruction.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is something people try to revive.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is a path that can be revived.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of Black Flame]]'s [[sacred artists]] imitate the power of a tribe of black [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is a path [[Lindon]] follows.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path]] of Black Flame is an offensive [[Path]] known for possessing high-quality cards and a famous variation of [[dragon]]'s breath. To aid in recovery, the [[Path]] utilizes a basic [[aura]] cycling technique. Although [[Lindon]] suffers from accumulating damage related to the [[Path]], it eventually advances into [[Highgold]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of Black Flame]] has a famous variation of [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of Black Flame]] has a basic [[aura]] cycling technique used for recovery.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The damage from the [[Path of Black Flame]] is adding up for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|the [[Path of Black Flame]] is an offensive [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of Black Flame]] has good cards.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s [[Path of Black Flame]] has advanced into [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is not suited for taking prisoners.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Originally absorbed by [[Lindon]] from [[Naian]], the [[Path]] of Black Flame is a power known to erode the user's mind, body, and soul. [[Lindon]] utilizes this ability by cycling through its various stages. The path is characterized by its capacity to punch through formidable defenses. However, it carries a significant risk, as the technique can cause a [[Ruler]] to detonate if they are torn between two different spirits.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is known to erode the mind, body, and soul.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] cycles the [[Path]] of the Black Flame.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is a path that can cause the [[Ruler technique]] to detonate when torn between two spirits.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of Black Flame]] needs to be able to punch through strong defenses.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of Black Flame]] was absorbed by [[Lindon]] from [[Naian]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of Black Flame]] burns away the physical form.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] fills himself with the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path of Black Flame]] caused damage to [[Orthos]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is associated with [[madra]] corruption.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] seeks power on the [[Path of Black Flame]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]] has insights into the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A script was written specifically to hold back the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]] has been giving pointers to those wishing to learn the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path of Black Flame]] is not well-suited for defense.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I have been giving pointers to the ones who wished to learn the Path of Black Flame.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
